queryName: ECS Cluster with Container Insights Disabled
expectedValue: 'aws_ecs_cluster[foo].setting.name' should be set to 'containerInsights' and 'aws_ecs_cluster[foo].setting.value' should be set to 'enabled'
actualValue: 'aws_ecs_cluster[foo].setting.name' is not set to 'containerInsights' and/or 'aws_ecs_cluster[foo].setting.value' is not set to 'enabled'
